message:
chore(beads): sync issues.jsonl

Beads issue tracker JSONL update reflecting issues that have been
closed, updated, or had comments appended in this session. JSONL is
the local-first source of truth for the beads issue store and is
synced to git per project convention; the .db is reconstructed from
this file. No code, schema, or workflow changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
